prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: THREE DIMENSIONAL STRUCTURE OF THE N-TERMINAL DOMAIN OF SYNTAXIN 1A. Entity description: PROTEIN (SYNTAXIN 1-A). Organism: Rattus norvegicus. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: withheld discovery hints: hard_topology_word_withheld:disulfide_secretory_context. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V69 E65 metadata context marks: assembly_context membrane_context_strong oligomer_context partner_copy_context topology_evidence transmembrane_context. Known E65 marks are allowed; hard-topology discovery labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.

hard topology hint disulfide_secretory_context is recorded for postseal mining, not handed to E65 as a solved word

v69_context_policy.context_derivation: V69 E65 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. It carries established E65 marks but withholds hard-topology missing-word labels from prediction context so V69 can discover them.
